positive: Stylized geometric forest creatures silhouette, featuring a family of woodland animals (fox, bunny, owl) interacting playfully under a stylized bioluminescent canopy. Clean lines, high contrast black and white vector art style, minimalist composition, designed for screen printing on apparel. The animals should have sharp, readable silhouettes and a sense of motion. Focus on symmetry and a centralized arrangement. Aesthetic details: repeating simple geometric patterns forming the background foliage. Color palette direction: Monochrome with accent spots of glowing teal and deep indigo. High resolution, printable quality, isolated on a clean background.
